error_signature: webhook returns 404 until I update the workflow on n8n UI
title: Webhook returns 404 until workflow is updated in UI
symptom: When trying to trigger a workflow via webhook after importing it programmatically, it returns a 404 error until the workflow is manually updated in the n8n UI.
applies_when: Importing a workflow with a webhook programmatically
not_this_if: Workflow is created and activated via the UI
Webhook is triggered after manual UI update
root_cause: The webhook configuration may not be properly initialized when imported programmatically, leading to a 404 error until the workflow is touched in the UI. This can happen if the webhookId is not unique or not set correctly during the import process.
fix_steps: Ensure the webhookId field in the workflow payload is unique and valid
Test the webhook again to see if it triggers correctly
agent_instruction: Check and ensure the webhookId is unique before importing the workflow programmatically.
